ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LIGIA MELENDEZ'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)

Amended Notice Of And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LIGIA MELENDEZ'S Amended Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)
